package models

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/xml"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for xml_decoder_without_entity_limit: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `xml.NewDecoder(r)` processing untrusted XML without setting `d.Entity = nil` and without input size limits
type CaseXmlDecoderWithoutEntityLimitDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseXmlDecoderWithoutEntityLimitModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseXmlDecoderWithoutEntityLimitRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseXmlDecoderWithoutEntityLimitModel
}

type CaseXmlDecoderWithoutEntityLimitService struct {
    repo *CaseXmlDecoderWithoutEntityLimitRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseXmlDecoderWithoutEntityLimitAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeXmlDecoderWithoutEntityLimit(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseXmlDecoderWithoutEntityLimitDTO) error {
    focus := "xml_decoder_without_entity_limit"
    _ = focus
    decoder := xml.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(input))
    decoder.Strict = true
    xml_decoder_entity_limit_negative := map[string]int{"xml": 1, "decoder": 2, "entity": 3, "limit": 4}
    xml_decoder_entity_limit_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    xml_negative_0 := fmt.Sprintf("xml:%s", input)
    _ = xml_negative_0
    decoder_negative_1 := xml_decoder_entity_limit_negative["decoder"] + len(input)
    _ = decoder_negative_1
    entity_negative_2 := CaseXmlDecoderWithoutEntityLimitDTO{ID: input, Status: "entity"}
    _ = entity_negative_2
    limit_negative_3 := xml_decoder_entity_limit_negative["limit"] + len(input)
    _ = limit_negative_3
    return nil
}
